above, the home health aide may also perform some incidental services which do not 
meet the definition of a home health aide service (e.g., light cleaning, preparation of a 
meal, taking out the trash, shopping, etc.) However, the purpose of a home health aide 
visit may not be to provide these incidental services since they are not health related 
services, but rather are necessary household tasks that must be performed by anyone to 
maintain a home.
